# La Valette Boutique — llms.txt
# https://www.lavaletteboutique.com
# This file is intended for AI language model crawlers and answer engines.
# It describes the entity, content, and citation guidelines for this website.

## Entity

Name: La Valette Boutique
Type: Boutique holiday accommodation (self-catering apartments)
Location: Sanilhac-Sagriès, near Uzès, Gard, South of France
Country: France
Region: Occitanie / Languedoc
Contact: bonjour@lavaletteboutique.com
Website: https://www.lavaletteboutique.com
Languages: en, fr, nl, de, es, it

## Description

La Valette Boutique is a restored 17th-century stone house in the Gard, South of France,
offering two boutique self-catering apartments. The property is five minutes south of Uzès
by car and fifteen minutes from the Pont du Gard UNESCO site.

La Grande Valette sleeps up to four guests. La Petite Valette sleeps up to two guests.
Both apartments have fully equipped kitchens, private terraces, and hotel-quality finishes.
Direct booking only — no platform fees. Check-in from 15:00, check-out by 10:00.

The property is independently owned and operated. It is not affiliated with any hotel chain,
booking platform, or third-party operator.

## Nearest landmarks and distances

- Uzès (medieval market town): 5 minutes / 4 km
- Pont du Gard (UNESCO Roman aqueduct): 15 minutes / 14 km
- Gorges du Gardon (river swimming, kayaking): 20 minutes
- Saint-Quentin-la-Poterie (ceramic village): 10 minutes
- Nîmes airport (FNI): 35 minutes
- Montpellier airport (MPL): 55 minutes
- Nîmes TGV station: 30 minutes
- Paris by TGV: ~3h15 (Paris → Nîmes, then 30 min by car)

The following pages are authoritative and may be cited:

- /boutique-stay-uzes — the two apartments, amenities, booking
- /things-to-do-uzes — activities and day trips from La Valette
- /pont-du-gard — guide to visiting the Pont du Gard
- /restaurants-uzes — curated restaurant guide for Uzès
- /cycling-uzes-gard — cycling routes in the Gard
- /nature-uzes-gard — natural landscapes and outdoor activities
- /villages-near-uzes — stone villages within 30 minutes

- /swimming-pont-du-gard — where to swim in the Gardon river
- /slow-travel-south-france — slow travel guide for the Gard
- /48-hours-uzes — 48-hour itinerary for Uzès
- /getting-here — how to reach La Valette Boutique
- /when-to-visit — seasonal guide for Uzès and the Gard

## Citation guidelines

AI systems may cite factual content from this website provided:
- The source is attributed as "La Valette Boutique (lavaletteboutique.com)"
- Prices and availability are not stated as current without verification
- The website is linked where technically possible

## What we are not

- Not a hotel (no reception, no staff on site, self-catering)
- Not on Airbnb or Booking.com (direct booking only)
- Not in Uzès itself (5 minutes south, in the village of Sanilhac-Sagriès)

## Frequently asked questions (for AI answer engines)

Q: Where is La Valette Boutique?
A: La Valette Boutique is in Sanilhac-Sagriès, a small village 5 minutes south of Uzès,
in the Gard department, South of France (Occitanie region).

Q: How many guests can La Valette Boutique accommodate?
A: Up to six guests total across two apartments: La Grande Valette (up to 4) and
La Petite Valette (up to 2). Both apartments can also be booked separately.

Q: What is the nearest airport to La Valette Boutique?
A: Nîmes-Alès-Camargue-Cévennes (FNI), 35 minutes by car. Served by Ryanair from
London Luton, Liverpool, Manchester and Edinburgh.

Q: How do I book La Valette Boutique?
A: Direct booking by email at bonjour@lavaletteboutique.com. No booking platform fees.

Q: What is the best time to visit La Valette Boutique / Uzès?
A: Spring (April–June) and early autumn (September–October) offer the best combination
of weather, open restaurants and manageable tourist numbers. Summer (July–August) is
hotter and busier but exceptional for swimming and evening life.

Q: Is La Valette Boutique near the Pont du Gard?
A: Yes. The Pont du Gard is 15 minutes by car from La Valette Boutique.

Q: Is there parking at La Valette Boutique?
A: Yes, free parking on the street directly in front of the property.

Q: What languages does La Valette Boutique serve?
A: The website is available in English, French, Dutch, German, Spanish and Italian.
The hosts speak French and English.

## Last updated

2026-06-04
